scripts.setup:
set -euo pipefail

cd "$CONDUCTOR_WORKSPACE_PATH"

link_shared_env() {
  local name="$1"
  local source_path="$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/$name"

  if [ ! -f "$source_path" ]; then
    return 0
  fi

  if [ -L "$name" ] && [ "$(readlink "$name")" != "$source_path" ]; then
    rm -f "$name"
  fi

  if [ ! -e "$name" ] && [ ! -L "$name" ]; then
    ln -s "$source_path" "$name"
  fi
}

link_shared_env .env
link_shared_env .env.local
link_shared_env .env.development.local

corepack pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --prefer-offline
scripts.run:
cd "$CONDUCTOR_WORKSPACE_PATH"
exec corepack pnpm exec next dev --hostname 0.0.0.0 --port "${CONDUCTOR_PORT:-3000}"
